script:
Everyone acted normal. Old couple in 1A. College guy in 2B. A quiet dude in 1C I’d barely spoken to.

Nothing suspicious.

That night, I decided to stay up.

2:25 AM.

Nothing.

2:28 AM.

Still clean.

2:31 AM.

The devices connected again.

But here’s what I noticed this time — the signal strength.

My router shows rough signal strength for connected devices.

All three had full bars.

Which means… they weren’t coming from another apartment.

They were very close.

Like… inside my unit close.

I checked my phone. My laptop. Smart TV. Everything matched known MAC addresses.

Then I remembered something.

Two weeks earlier, maintenance had come to “check wiring.”

They were inside my apartment for maybe 20 minutes.

I didn’t think much of it.
